notes: Highlight URLs are checked-in data used by the group panel runtime.
Runtime must not scrape ESPN, FOX, FIFA, YouTube, or any external source.
Completed matches without a stored URL remain static evidence in the group panel.
Stored links were verified from search metadata against teams, World Cup 2026 context, and local final-score matchEvidence.
